text: Hello. Hello. Yeah. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through West Virginia State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? No. I ain't got Medicare. Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
